name: command_run
description: Run one mirrorable Cobra command by its space-separated command path.

args.description: Additional positional arguments only; raw flags rejected.

flags.description: Safe flags to pass by name: command-local flags plus, for mutating commands, the write-safety gate flags (yes, dry-run, allow-destructive, max-changes, continue-on-error, max-failures) — pass {"yes": true} to apply a write. Inspect available flags via command_search.

name.description: Exact space-separated command path to run, such as "items enrich".

name: command_search
description: Search and inspect mirrorable Cobra commands exposed through the command orchestration facade.

name.description: Exact space-separated command path to inspect, such as "items enrich".

query.description: Case-insensitive text to match against command names and summaries.

name: context
description: Get API domain context: resource taxonomy, auth requirements, query tips, and unique capabilities. Call this first.

name: search
description: Full-text search across all synced data. Faster than paginating list endpoints. Requires sync first. Large responses are bounded to the MCP tool-result budget.

query.description: Search query (supports FTS5 syntax: AND, OR, NOT, quotes for phrases)

name: sql
description: Run read-only SQL against local database. Use for ad-hoc analysis, aggregations, and joins across synced resources. Requires sync first. Returns a JSON object with rows, truncated, and row_limit; large responses are bounded to the MCP tool-result budget.

query.description: SQL query (SELECT or WITH...SELECT). Tables match resource names.

name: workflow_submit
description: Submit an inline multi-step workflow executed by zotio's transactional runner — previews unless yes; one approval, one journal run id; steps validated per-command exactly like command_run.

continue_on_error.description: Continue executing later steps after a step fails.

command.description: Mirrorable command path, such as items enrich.

stdin_from.description: Name of an earlier step whose output becomes stdin.

yes.description: Apply the full workflow once instead of previewing it.
